no_data_banner.title: Module is active — just needs data
no_data_banner.description: Upload at least one sales CSV to see KPIs, charts and alerts in real time.

kpis.estimated_tooltip_autonomy: Rough estimate based on period cashflow accumulation. Does not reflect actual bank balance or credit lines. Use as a directional signal only.
kpis.tooltip_operational_coverage: How many days the current net margin would cover daily outflows. Based on burn rate, NOT bank balance. Use as a directional signal.
kpis.estimated_tooltip_dso: Estimated value. Improves as you add due dates to sales.
kpis.estimated_tooltip_dpo: Estimated value. Improves as you add due dates to purchases.
kpis.estimated_tooltip_ccc: Estimated value. Simplified cycle (no inventory days).
kpis.tooltip_net_result: Your business profit (or loss) after ALL costs. If negative, you are spending more than you earn.
kpis.tooltip_operating_margin_pct: The percentage of revenue remaining after variable costs. Above 20% is good, below 10% is concerning.
kpis.tooltip_outflow_ratio: How much of your revenue goes to outflows. Below 80% is healthy, above 100% means you spend more than you earn.
kpis.tooltip_break_even: The minimum revenue needed to cover all costs. If your revenue is below this, you are at a loss.
kpis.tooltip_break_even_no_fixed: No fixed costs are recorded, so break-even is not applicable.
kpis.tooltip_break_even_na: Variable costs exceed revenue: break-even is unreachable with the current cost structure. Reduce variable costs or increase revenue.
kpis.tooltip_health_score: Composite indicator (0-100) across 5 financial dimensions. A directional signal, not a precise diagnosis: 25% of the weight depends on estimated or partial data.
kpis.tooltip_forecast: Projection based on recorded payment due dates. Does not correspond to actual bank balance.
kpis.tooltip_fixed_costs: Rent, salaries, leasing and other costs you pay regardless of revenue. The amount is prorated to the selected period: if you select 15 days, you see half the monthly cost.
kpis.tooltip_burn_rate: How much you spend on average every day, combining all outflows (operational + supplier + fixed). Helps estimate how long your cash will last.
kpis.tooltip_fixed_costs_pct: How much fixed costs weigh on revenue. Above 30% the structure is expensive relative to revenue. Below 15% is lean.

total_sales.def: Total revenue from all sales in the selected period.
total_sales.calc: Sum of all recorded sales/income amounts.
total_sales.read: Higher is better. Compare with the trend arrow to see if you are growing.

total_expenses.def: Day-to-day operating costs, excluding supplier purchases and fixed costs.
total_expenses.calc: Sum of all recorded operating expense amounts.
total_expenses.read: Evaluate relative to revenue. A rising trend may signal cost pressure.

supplier_purchases.def: Total cost of goods and materials bought from suppliers.
supplier_purchases.calc: Sum of purchase totals (including VAT when recorded).
supplier_purchases.read: Track relative to revenue. Sudden spikes may indicate stock-up or price changes.

fixed_costs.def: Recurring costs regardless of revenue: rent, salaries, leasing.
fixed_costs.calc: Monthly amounts prorated to the selected period.
fixed_costs.read: These don't change with sales. Keep under 30% of revenue for a lean structure.

net_result.def: Your profit or loss after ALL costs (operating + purchases + fixed).
net_result.read: Positive = profit. Negative = loss. The most important number on your dashboard.

burn_rate.def: Average daily spending across all cost categories.
burn_rate.calc: (Expenses + Purchases + Fixed Costs) / days in period.
burn_rate.read: Higher = faster cash consumption. Useful to estimate how long cash will last.

break_even.def: Minimum revenue to cover all costs — zero profit, zero loss.
break_even.read: Revenue above = profit. Below = loss. 'N/A' = insufficient data.

break_even_na.def: Break-even cannot be computed with the current cost structure.
break_even_na.calc: Variable costs > Revenue: break-even is unreachable.
break_even_na.read: Reduce variable costs or increase revenue to unlock break-even.

break_even_no_fixed.def: Break-even is not applicable without recorded fixed costs.
break_even_no_fixed.calc: No fixed costs have been uploaded to the system.
break_even_no_fixed.read: Add fixed costs (rent, salaries) to enable this indicator.

operational_coverage.def: Estimated days your current margin would cover daily outflows.
operational_coverage.calc: Net Result / daily Burn Rate. PROXY — not based on bank balance.
operational_coverage.read: Under 30 days = caution. Over 60 days = comfortable. This is an estimate, not real liquidity.

fixed_costs_pct.def: Weight of fixed costs relative to your revenue.
fixed_costs_pct.read: Under 15% = lean. 15-30% = moderate. Over 30% = heavy structure.

operating_margin_pct.def: Revenue remaining after variable costs, before fixed costs.
operating_margin_pct.read: Above 20% = good. Below 10% = concerning. Supplementary metric — not scored.

outflow_ratio.def: Total outflows as a percentage of revenue.
outflow_ratio.read: Under 80% = healthy. Over 100% = spending more than you earn. Supplementary metric.

charts.sales_expenses_desc: Daily income and operating expenses in the period
charts.net_cashflow_desc: Daily result after all outflows (operating, supplier, fixed costs)
charts.cumulative_desc: Running total of daily net result over the period. Does not reflect actual bank balance.
charts.cumulative_info: Note: this chart shows the cashflow accumulation over the period, NOT your actual bank balance. If the line rises, you are accumulating; if it falls, you are eroding cash.

analysis.flow_desc: How your revenue is absorbed by different cost categories.
analysis.pareto_desc: Top suppliers by purchase amount and cumulative concentration
analysis.pareto_no_data: No supplier purchase data in the period
analysis.composition_desc: Operating expenses, purchases and fixed costs over time

scadenzario.forecast_desc: Estimated liquidity projection based on recorded due dates. Does not correspond to actual bank balance and depends on data completeness.
scadenzario.data_quality_warning: Add due dates and payment status to your sales and purchases for a more accurate payment schedule. Note: zero values may indicate missing data, not absence of receivables/payables.
scadenzario.no_data_message: Add due dates (due_date) to your sales and purchases to unlock the payment schedule: aging, timeline, liquidity forecast, DSO/DPO/CCC.

fixed_costs_tab.chart_desc: Fixed costs vs variable expenses comparison in the period
fixed_costs_tab.table_desc: Current fixed cost details for the organization

data_page.title: Data Management
data_page.subtitle: Upload and manage income, expenses, purchases and fixed costs

forms.iva_tooltip: VAT rate applied (optional). Leave empty if not applicable.
forms.name: Name

validation.min_one_row: Enter at least one row with date and amount
validation.amount_positive: Amount must be greater than zero
validation.purchase_complete_row: Enter at least one complete row
validation.purchase_positive: Quantity and unit price must be greater than zero
validation.fixed_complete_row: Enter at least one complete row (name, category, amount, start date)
validation.fixed_amount_positive: Amount must be greater than zero

activation.title: Activate the Cashflow Monitor
activation.desc: Monitor daily inflows and outflows, detect anomalies and get AI analysis on your cashflow.

health.title: Financial Health
health.info_text: A composite indicator from 0 to 100 summarizing your business health across 5 financial dimensions. This is a directional signal, not a precise diagnosis. 25% of the weight depends on estimated or partial data.
health.info_dim_net_margin: Net Margin (25pt): profit after all costs, as a percentage of revenue. Negative means you are losing money.
health.info_dim_dynamics: Revenue Dynamics (20pt): sales and margin trend. Shows if business is growing or declining.
health.info_dim_structural: Structural Strength (20pt): break-even distance and fixed cost leverage.
health.info_dim_cash_cycle: Cash Cycle (25pt): gap between collection and payment timing (DSO-DPO). Requires payment status data.
health.info_dim_risk: Operational Risk (10pt): absence of critical alerts and data completeness.
health.config_desc: Enable or disable dimensions to include in the score. Weight is redistributed automatically.

upload.result_parsing_errors: {{count}} rows skipped due to data errors

alerts_tab.title: Anomaly Alerts
alerts_tab.no_alerts_desc: Cashflow appears normal. Run analysis to check for updates.

filters.title: Filters
filters.no_results_filtered: No results match the current filters.
